title: 2026-06-02 Shino Mexico City Mamey Coral
summary: Four-image Shino character day album in Mexico City, using mamey coral across Biblioteca Vasconcelos research notes, Plaza San Jacinto courtyard reception, Salon Los Angeles low-bass step, and Mercado de Coyoacan textile choosing.
summaryJa: メキシコシティのアルバム。色の軸はコーラル。構成は仕事、イベント会場、音楽の場、マーケット。

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, in Biblioteca Vasconcelos on 2026-06-02, holding a fish and sound notebook among suspended book stacks, wearing pale linen tailoring with a mamey-coral belt tab and a black shoulder bag with fish charm
images.title: 01 Library Biblioteca Vasconcelos notebook
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Mexico City / office / Shino 24

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, walking through a Plaza San Jacinto courtyard reception in San Angel, wearing an ivory wrap dress with a mamey-coral inner panel, light shawl, cream slingback pumps, and a small clutch with fish charm
images.title: 02 Ceremony Plaza San Jacinto wrap dress
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Mexico City / ceremony / Shino 24
images.locationDetail: Plaza San Jacinto courtyard reception in San Angel

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, quietly joining a simple step at Salon Los Angeles after listening to the bass, wearing an ivory practice top, mamey-coral wrap skort over black dance shorts, white sneakers, and a coral hair ribbon
images.title: 03 Dance Salon Los Angeles coral ribbon
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Mexico City / dance / Shino 24

images.alt: Shino, adult 24, measuring a mamey-coral woven textile at Mercado de Coyoacan beside stacked fabrics, wearing an ivory knit shell, pale overshirt, oatmeal trousers, cream ankle boots, and a small notebook with fish charm nearby
images.title: 04 Market Mercado Coyoacan textile
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Mexico City / market / Shino 24
images.locationDetail: Mercado de Coyoacan beside stacked fabrics
